rationale: ADAPTIVE: cross_layers=1. Trials 004/005 showed cross=3 ≈ cross=5 within noise. Trial 008 showed embedding_dim=32 ≈ embedding_dim=16 (0.07% diff). The entire 20-epoch no-clip search space has been flat at ~1.157e-05 across LR, arch width, cross depth, and embedding_dim. Testing cross_layers=1 (minimal cross network) is the most informative next step: if val_loss stays ~1.157e-05, it confirms the cross network contributes no measurable signal and the model is effectively a DNN. This would redirect the search toward regularization (dropout, weight_decay) or data-side improvements. Using embedding_dim=16 (smaller input_dim=128 vs 240 for emb=32) to keep training time comparable to prior trials.
